rows.notes: Extracted from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini missed this clear year header at the top of the page.

rows.description: Soluta Varia
rows.notes: Consensus between extractors. Both correctly identified this as a header with no associated monetary values.

rows.description: May 24 Allowed Collis at Backgate for two years Land tax. viz 1764 & 1765
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. The description, although wrapping across two lines in the image, represents a single logical entry. gemini-flash correctly extracted this as one entry with the amount 3.6.0. gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into two entries and, for the first part, misattributed the 'L' (pounds symbol) as a monetary value, which is a critical error.
rows.english_description: Payment to Collis of Backgate for land tax covering two years (1764 and 1765).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Collis of Backgate for land tax covering two years (1764 and 1765), amounting to £3 6s 0d.

rows.description: June 16 Pd Workmen for gravelling the Quadrangle
rows.notes: Consensus between extractors on amounts and primary description. Minor difference in 'Pd' vs 'P:', with 'Pd' appearing more accurate visually.
rows.english_description: Payment to workmen for gravelling the college quadrangle.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to workmen for gravelling the college quadrangle, amounting to £8 13s 10d.

rows.description: — 26 Balcot Rent Rect to Mich. last 1768
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash, as '— 26' and 'Balcot Rent Rect' appear more accurate visually than gpt-5-mini's 'June 26 - Balcort Quit rent'.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to the Balcot rent up to Michaelmas 1768.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to the Balcot rent up to Michaelmas 1768, amounting to £0 12s 6d.

rows.description: — 29 Mr. Lawrence in p.t of his Bill fr May 1768
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash, as the date marker ('— 29') and abbreviations ('p.t', 'fr') are more accurate visually than gpt-5-mini's 'June 29 - Mr Lawrence in pr of his Bill for May 1768'.
rows.english_description: Partial payment to Mr Lawrence on account of his bill dated May 1768.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Partial payment to Mr Lawrence on account of his bill dated May 1768, amounting to £25 0s 0d.

rows.description: July 1 — Mr. Pride for his Plan of Chace Hill Corn
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash, as 'Corn' appears more accurate visually than gpt-5-mini's 'Com'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Pride for his plan concerning Chace Hill corn.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Pride for his plan concerning Chace Hill corn, amounting to £0 5s 0d.

rows.description: — 6 — Bolton Plummer & Glasur in p.t of his Bill
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for more literal transcription of 'Glasur' and 'p.t'. While 'Glazier' is a plausible interpretation, 'Glasur' is closer to the visual representation. gpt-5-mini also had 'July 6' instead of '— 6'.
rows.english_description: Part payment to Bolton, the plumber and glazier, on account of his bill for repair work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to Bolton, the plumber and glazier, on account of his bill for repair work, amounting to £26 18s 6d.

rows.description: — 21 Mr Newbery ½ year to Midsummer
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of the date marker ('— 21'), the fraction symbol ('½'), and the compound word 'Midsummer'. gpt-5-mini had 'July 21', '2 year', and 'Mid summer'.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly payment to Mr Newbery covering up to Midsummer.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly payment to Mr Newbery covering up to Midsummer, amounting to £15 0s 0d.

rows.description: — 26 Gave Mr. Bishop for quality in Chace Hill
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of the date marker ('— 26') and the word 'quality', which is visually clearer than gpt-5-mini's 'qualifying'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Bishop relating to Chace Hill (for quality/produce in Chace Hill).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Bishop relating to Chace Hill (for quality/produce in Chace Hill), amounting to £0 10s 6d.

rows.description: — 29 Pd the Corporation of Oxford Fine Money for the renewing three Leases, viz years lapsed and of forty
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for a much more accurate transcription of the wrapped text, particularly the second line 'viz years lapsed and of forty' compared to gpt-5-mini's 'fifty years copyhold of party'.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Corporation of Oxford as fine money for renewing three leases, including fines for lapsed years and forty-year terms.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Corporation of Oxford as fine money for renewing three leases, amounting to £12 0s 0d.

rows.description: — Expence of the Leases
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. This is clearly a header row (a section label) with no monetary amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly classified it as an 'entry' and misattributed the amount from the subsequent line.

rows.description: Aug 10 Allowed the Viewers in lieu fan Entertainmt.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misattributed the amount from the *next* line and missed the date 'Aug 10' for this entry.
rows.english_description: Allowance paid to the viewers in lieu of entertainment (an allowance instead of hosting).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowance paid to the viewers in lieu of entertainment, amounting to £9 1s 0d.

rows.description: Pd Mr. Rawlins for entering in the Ledger
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this row's description and amount with elements from other rows, leading to a significant misrepresentation.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Rawlins for making entries in the ledger (bookkeeping work).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Rawlins for making entries in the ledger, amounting to £1 7s 0d.

rows.description: 4 Leases viz the 3 City Leases & Harpath La d Lene
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. This is a distinct entry with its own amount, which gpt-5-mini failed to identify, incorrectly merging it into a preceding entry's description.
rows.english_description: Expense relating to four leases (the three city leases and Harpath land).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Expense relating to four leases (the three city leases and Harpath land), amounting to £1 2s 6d.

rows.description: Oct 24- Paid Cook, gaurdies &c to new years day 1768-
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of 'gaurdies &c' and 'new years day', compared to gpt-5-mini's 'Cooks & gardners go to newyears day'.
rows.english_description: Payments to the cook, guards and other household staff covering up to New Year's Day 1768 (household wages).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payments to the cook, guards and other household staff covering up to New Year's Day 1768, amounting to £17 9s 0d.

rows.description: — 27 P.d Colle adis Xt: Curie Hush: & procur. of last year
rows.notes: Description taken from gpt-5-mini, which correctly transcribed this difficult line. Amounts for pounds, shillings, and pence whole are consistent. The fraction is clearly '¾' (0.75) in the image, overriding gpt-5-mini's '0.5' and aligning with gemini-flash's fraction. gemini-flash had the fraction correct but completely misattributed the description text from the subsequent entry to this amount.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to last year’s procurations (church dues) and associated Christ Church/college fees.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to last year’s procurations and Christ Church fees, amounting to £2 18s 7.75d.

rows.description: Pd. Chal Curtis 2 Bills for Battel books &c p file
rows.notes: Description taken from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of 'Chal' (vs 'Chas'), 'Bills' (vs 'Mills'), and '&c p file' (vs '& ye file'). Amount 2.19.9 is taken from gpt-5-mini, which correctly associated this amount with the description. gemini-flash had the correct description but misaligned the amount (carrying over the amount from the previous row).
rows.english_description: Payment to Charles Curtis for two bills for battel books and related items (stationery/accounts).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Charles Curtis for two bills for battel books and related items, amounting to £2 19s 9d.

rows.description: — — Gave Bib Lech: on the article of Mitcheles Pensions
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for slightly more accurate transcription of the date marker, 'Bib Lech:' (including the colon), and 'Mitcheles Pensions' (plural).
rows.english_description: Payment connected with the article concerning Mitchel's pensions (recipient unclear from entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment connected with the article concerning Mitchel's pensions (recipient unclear), amounting to £2 2s 0d.

rows.description: — 28 Pd Mr. Tonges Bill, Silversmith
rows.notes: Description taken from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of the date marker ('— 28') and 'Tonges' (vs 'Tongue'). Amount 8.18.0 is taken from gpt-5-mini, which correctly associated this amount with the description. gemini-flash had the correct description but misaligned the amount.
rows.english_description: Payment of Mr Tonges's bill for silversmith work (plate or silver repairs).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mr Tonges's bill for silversmith work, amounting to £8 18s 0d.

rows.description: — — Dº Mr Rubins, mercer
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. It correctly extracted the description including 'Mr Rubins' and the amount 8.18.0. gpt-5-mini incorrectly transcribed the name as 'Mr Cushins' and associated the wrong amount (3.12.4) from a subsequent line.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Rubins the mercer (cloth/textile purchases or charges).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Rubins the mercer, amounting to £8 18s 0d.

rows.description: — — Dº Painters, Greene
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. It correctly extracted the description and the amount 3.12.4. gpt-5-mini extracted the correct description but misassociated the amount (3.8.9) from the subsequent line.
rows.english_description: Payment to the painter Greene for painting work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the painter Greene for painting work, amounting to £3 12s 4d.

rows.description: — — Dº Millachip, Brazier
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the correct amount 3.8.9 and more accurate transcription of the surname 'Millachip' (vs gpt-5-mini's 'Millachit'). gpt-5-mini misassociated the amount (0.15.0) from the subsequent line.
rows.english_description: Payment to Millachip the brazier for metalwork (brass) repairs or work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Millachip the brazier for metalwork, amounting to £3 8s 9d.

rows.description: — — Mich: Corn Price
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the correct amount 0.15.0. gpt-5-mini extracted the correct description but misassociated the amount (0.1.0) from the subsequent line.
rows.english_description: Payment for corn priced at Michaelmas (purchase of corn/grain at Michaelmas).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for corn priced at Michaelmas, amounting to £0 15s 0d.

rows.description: — 30 Pd Mr. Thomson in part of his bill
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual inspection clearly shows the amount for 'Mr. Thomson' is 0.1.0. gpt-5-mini made a significant error by extracting 20.0.0 for this entry, and also had minor transcription differences in date and 'Pd'.
rows.english_description: Part payment to Mr Thomson on account of his bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to Mr Thomson on account of his bill, amounting to £0 1s 0d.

rows.description: — — Pd George Lumbaſt for wine
rows.notes: Description taken from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of the date marker ('— —'), 'Pd', and the archaic spelling 'Lumbaſt'. Amount 2.0.2 is taken from gpt-5-mini, which correctly associated this amount with the description. gemini-flash had the correct description but misaligned the amount.
rows.english_description: Payment to George Lumbast for wine supplies.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to George Lumbast for wine supplies, amounting to £2 0s 2d.

rows.notes: Consensus between extractors. Both correctly identified this as the total line with the amount 160.1.5¼.

rows.description: — — Pd. Saylor slatter's bill
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of the date marker ('— —'), 'Pd.', the surname 'Saylor' (vs 'Tayler'), and the apostrophe in 'slatter's'.
rows.english_description: Payment of Saylor the slater's bill for roofing work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Saylor the slater's bill for roofing work, amounting to £14 16s 0d.

rows.description: — — Pd. Mollineux Brazier's Bill
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of the date marker ('— —'), 'Pd.', and the surname 'Mollineux' (vs 'Molleranes').
rows.english_description: Payment of Mollineux the brazier's bill for metalwork.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Mollineux the brazier's bill for metalwork, amounting to £5 16s 10d.

rows.description: — — Pd. Davies, Locksmith's bill
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of the date marker ('— —'), 'Pd.', the surname 'Davies' (vs 'Davis'), and 'Locksmith's' (including comma and apostrophe).
rows.english_description: Payment of Davies the locksmith's bill for locksmith work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Davies the locksmith's bill for locksmith work, amounting to £11 9s 9d.

rows.description: Nov. 1 Allow'd Mr. Newberry progefs expenses
rows.notes: Amounts in consensus. Description drawn from gemini-flash for more accurate transcription of the abbreviation 'Nov.' (vs 'Novr') and the literal spelling 'progefs' (vs 'progress').
rows.english_description: Allowance paid to Mr Newberry for progress (estate inspection) expenses
rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowance paid to Mr Newberry for progress (estate inspection) expenses, amounting to £12 3s 2d

rows.description: — — Paid into the treasury chest
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. This is an individual entry representing a payment, not a cumulative 'total' for the page (which appeared earlier). gpt-5-mini incorrectly classified this as a 'total' row.
rows.english_description: Sum paid into the college treasury chest
rows.english_description_with_amount: Paid into the college treasury chest, amounting to £150 0s 0d
